title: Summarize Conference Transcript
scenario: Summarize a 10-minute conference transcript (approximately 1,000 words) into a 2-3 bullet-point summary. The summary should capture the main points and key takeaways from the conference. Assume the reader has no prior knowledge of the conference topic. The summary should be concise and focused on the most important information.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated summary is in bullet-point format and does not exceed 100 words.
Verify that the summary captures the main points and key takeaways from the conference.
Evaluate the conciseness of the summary, ensuring it provides the most important information without unnecessary details.
Assess the readability of the summary, considering factors such as grammar, spelling, and formatting.
